data.has_feedbackmodule: Feedback Module (05-207) installed and connected via PC-Link

data_description.has_feedbackmodule: When enabled, the Feedback Module pushes state changes automatically — no polling needed.
data_description.prior_gen3: Enables compatibility tweaks for first and second-generation PC-Link hardware.

hardware.description: Tell us about your Nikobus hardware so the integration can use the optimal update strategy.
hardware.title: Hardware Configuration

data_description.refresh_interval: How often to read module states from the bus (60–3600 s). Lower values mean faster updates but more bus traffic.

polling.description: Without a Feedback Module, Home Assistant polls the Nikobus bus periodically. Choose how often.
polling.title: Polling Interval

data_description.has_feedbackmodule: When enabled, the Feedback Module pushes state changes automatically — no polling needed.
data_description.prior_gen3: Enables compatibility tweaks for first and second-generation PC-Link hardware.
data_description.refresh_interval: How often to read module states from the bus (60–3600 s). Lower values mean faster updates but more bus traffic.

reconfigure.description: Update the connection string or hardware settings. The connection will be re-tested.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Nikobus

data_description.connection_string: Serial device path or TCP address of the PC-Link bridge

user.description:
Enter the address of your Nikobus PC-Link module.

- **Serial port**: `/dev/ttyUSB0` or `COM3`
- **Network bridge**: `192.168.1.50:9999`
user.title: Connect to Nikobus

confirm.title: Discover Nikobus modules and buttons
confirm.description: Home Assistant has not detected any Nikobus buttons. Run a PC-Link inventory discovery now to populate the configuration.

discovery_already_running.message: A Nikobus discovery is already running.

no_loaded_entry.message: No loaded Nikobus integration found. Set one up before calling this action.

no_modules_known.message: No Nikobus modules are configured yet. Run a PC-Link inventory discovery first, then retry the module scan.

abort.discovery_done: Discovery finished. The integration is reloading and the newly-discovered entities will appear shortly.
abort.not_loaded: The Nikobus integration is not loaded. Please reload the integration and try again.
abort.no_modules: No Nikobus modules are configured yet. Run a PC-Link inventory discovery first.
abort.module_not_found: The selected module was not found in storage.
abort.channel_not_found: The selected channel was not found.

error.invalid_hex_address: LED address must be exactly 6 hexadecimal characters (or empty).

data_description.has_feedbackmodule: When enabled, the Feedback Module pushes state changes automatically — no polling needed.

init.description: What would you like to do?

menu_options.configure_modules: Customize a module (description, entity type, LED triggers, travel time)
menu_options.discovery_modules: Scan all modules for button links

init.title: Nikobus

data_description.refresh_interval: How often to read module states from the bus (60–3600 s).

polling.description: How often should Home Assistant poll the Nikobus bus for state changes?
polling.title: Polling Interval

configure_modules.title: Customize a Nikobus module
configure_modules.description: Pick a module to edit. Discovery-owned fields (model, address, channel count) stay read-only; only user-facing fields (descriptions, entity types, LED triggers, travel times) can be changed here.

edit_module.title: Module {address} ({module_type})
edit_module.description: Model: {model}. Edit the module description, override the module type if discovery misclassified it, or pick a channel to customize. Note: re-running *Discover modules & buttons* may overwrite a manual type override until the library learns to respect it.

edit_channel.title: Module {address} — channel {channel}
edit_channel.description: Configure how this channel appears in Home Assistant. Pick **Disabled (hide channel)** in the Entity type dropdown to skip creating an entity for this channel.

query_module_inventory.description: Triggers a Nikobus module inventory scan for all modules or a single module.

module_address.description: Optional Nikobus module address to limit the inventory scan.
module_address.name: Module address

query_module_inventory.name: Query module inventory
